entries.definition: gourd bush to grow over him.
entries.definition_english: gourd bush to grow over him.

entries.definition:
y–q–ẓ to be awake, to be alert, to be attentive, to stir up,
vigilance. Of this root, أَيْقَاظ ʾayqāẓ occurs only once in the
Qur’an.

أَيْقَاظ ʾayqāẓ [pl. of intens. act. part. يَقِظ yaqīẓ] awake, alert (18:18)
وَتَحْسَبُهُمْ أَيْقَاظًا وَهُمْ رُقُودٌ you would have thought they were awake,
though they lay asleep.
entries.definition_english:
